ddls:
CREATE TABLE "chemicals" (
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chemical */,
  "chemical_name" TEXT /* Name of the chemical */,
  "cas_number" TEXT /* Chemical Abstracts Service (CAS) number */,
  "chemical_formula" TEXT /* Chemical formula */,
  "hazard_class" TEXT /* Hazard class of the chemical */,
  "safety_data_sheet" TEXT /* Link to the Safety Data Sheet (SDS) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the chemical was first recorded in the system */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the chemical's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chemical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emissions" (
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission record */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the chemical being monitored */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the facility where the emissions are recorded */,
  "emission_date" TEXT /* Date when the emissions were recorded */,
  "emission_quantity" REAL /* Total quantity of emissions (in tons) for the specific chemical */,
  "emission_method" INTEGER /* Reference to the disposal method used for emissions */,
  "emission_units" TEXT /* Units of measurement for emissions */,
  "emission_source" TEXT /* Source of the emissions */,
  "fugitive_emissions" REAL /* Amount of fugitive air emissions (in tons) */,
  "point_source_emissions" REAL /* Amount of point source air emissions (in tons) */,
  "surface_water_discharges" REAL /* Amount of surface water discharges (in tons) */,
  "land_treatment" REAL /* Amount of on-site land treatment (in tons) */,
  "other_land_disposal" REAL /* Amount of other on-site land disposal (in tons) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_emission_method FOREIGN KEY ("emission_method") REFERENCES disposal_methods ("disposal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_chemical_id FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id") REFERENCES chemicals ("chemical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disposal_methods" (
  "disposal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disposal method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the disposal method */,
  "method_type" TEXT /* Type of disposal method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the disposal method */,
  "regulatory_standard" TEXT /* Regulatory standard or guideline associated with the disposal method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disposal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance report */,
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the emissions record */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the facility where the report is generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of compliance report */,
  "regulatory_agency" TEXT /* Name of the regulatory agency the report is submitted to */,
  "report_reviewer" TEXT /* Name of the person who reviewed the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "report_link" TEXT /* Link to the full compliance report document */,
  "is_compliant" INTEGER /* Indicator if the emissions are within compliance standards */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes related to the compliance review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_reports_emission_id FOREIGN KEY ("emission_id") REFERENCES emissions ("emission_id")
)
